sections.instruction: Choose the correct letter A, B or C.

questions.content: What did Nadia buy at the bookshop?
Thomas is interested in the play about
The couple in the bookshop were discussing
How does Nadia want her coffee?
What kind of muffin does Nadia want?

sections.instruction:
How likely are Thomas and Nadia to visit the following attractions? Write the correct letter A, B or C next to questions 6-10.
A they will definitely visit
B they might visit
C they will not visit

questions.content: (6) the Tower of London (7) the Wheel (8) Westminster (9) the British Museum (10) Buckingham Palace

sections.instruction: Label the plan below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for each answer.
Complete the notes below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for each answer.
sections.passage_or_context:
Research Methodology
• Use scientific method based on empirical evidence (= (21) {{BLANK}})
• Find a research problem or question
o a commonly held belief e.g. lack of sleep has negative impact on (22) {{BLANK}}
o Review the literature
o an everyday problem e.g. research different memorization (23) {{BLANK}}
• Define your variables
• Develop a hypothesis
• Conduct (24) {{BLANK}} research
o Books, journals, online databases and websites
o Make notes and create (25) {{BLANK}}
• Select an experimental design
o Pre-experimental = experimental group only
o Quasi-experimental = include control group but not random
o True experimental = both kinds of groups + random
• Standardize your (26) {{BLANK}}
o Compare like with like
• Choose your participants
• Use different (27) {{BLANK}}
o Random sample – sample from same group
o Stratified random sample – select from subsets with different (28) {{BLANK}}
• Conduct tests and collect data
• Analyse the results
o Use (29) {{BLANK}} methods (to be covered next week)
• Write up and communicate results
o (30) {{BLANK}} and {{BLANK}} of paper is important; tips for writing (to be covered in next two weeks)

sections.instruction: Complete the table below. Write ONE WORD AND/ OR A NUMBER only.
Complete the summary below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for each answer.
sections.passage_or_context: Rice gives more (35) {{BLANK}} per hectare than other cereal crops and production has increased over 100% in recent years because of better yields. Land area has only increased by 30% due to the need for wet land so availability of land is quite limited by (36) {{BLANK}} type and (37) {{BLANK}} supply. The dry-land variety gives poorer yields and poorer (38) {{BLANK}} No weed killers have been developed yet that do not harm the main crop. Heavy machines are unable to work in paddy fields so most rice is still grown (39) {{BLANK}}

questions.content: Rice gives more (35) {{BLANK}} per hectare than other cereal crops and production has increased over 100% in recent years because of better yields. Land area has only increased by 30% due to the need for wet land so availability of land is quite limited by (36) {{BLANK}} type and (37) {{BLANK}} supply. The dry-land variety gives poorer yields and poorer (38) {{BLANK}} No weed killers have been developed yet that do not harm the main crop. Heavy machines are unable to work in paddy fields so most rice is still grown (39) {{BLANK}}
